findings_addressed.title: Fail-open on malformed JSON
findings_addressed.root_cause: When crates.io returns HTTP 200 with a non-JSON body, jq exits non-zero silently, the version check falls through to `return 1` (not found), and the helper proceeds to `cargo publish`. Duplicate-version error at registry, not a graceful abort.
findings_addressed.fix: Added JSON parse validation (jq .) immediately after curl succeeds, before the version lookup. If parse fails: print 'registry returned malformed JSON for <crate>' to stderr and return 2. Existing curl-failure → return 2 path unchanged.

findings_addressed.title: Tests don't exercise the manifest reader
findings_addressed.root_cause: All decision-case tests injected CARGO_PUBLISH_IF_NEW_LOCAL_VERSION, bypassing resolve_local_version entirely. Neither the inline `version = "X"` nor `version.workspace = true` code path was covered.
findings_addressed.fix: Added two new test cases (tests 9 and 10) that invoke the helper WITHOUT CARGO_PUBLISH_IF_NEW_LOCAL_VERSION, forcing the manifest reader to run against the real repo Cargo.toml files (read-only path, safe in test): (a) fathomdb-embedder-api with inline `version = "0.6.0"` → skip; (b) fathomdb-engine with `version.workspace = true` resolved to 0.6.1 → cargo publish.

tdd_evidence.red_evidence: Ran scripts/tests/test_cargo_publish_if_new.sh with the 3 new test cases added but BEFORE the helper fix. Test 8 (malformed JSON) FAILED: rc=0, cargo was invoked ('publish -p fathomdb-broken --token test-token'), helper output='cargo-publish-if-new: fathomdb-broken@0.6.1 not on registry; publishing' — proving the fail-open bug. Tests 9 and 10 PASSED, confirming the existing manifest reader correctly handles both inline and workspace-inherited versions.
tdd_evidence.green_evidence: After adding the jq parse-validation guard to registry_has_version(), re-ran scripts/tests/test_cargo_publish_if_new.sh. All 10 tests pass: 7 original + test 8 (malformed JSON → exit 2) + test 9 (inline manifest reader) + test 10 (workspace manifest reader).

new_tests: 8: malformed registry JSON → exit 2, fail-closed, no cargo call
9: manifest reader: inline version (0.6.0) → skip already-published
10: manifest reader: workspace-inherited version (0.6.1) → cargo publish

scope_compliance: Helper-script + tests only. No engine code changes. No release.yml workflow edits.
next_step_for_orchestrator: codex re-review of fix-1 delta; on PASS, FF main; spawn 0.6.1-RC1 slice.
